title: Hermes Agent + Mixture of Agents is insane…
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates the combination of Hermes Agent and Mixture of Agents approaches for AI agent execution. The video promises to show how these techniques work together and provides resources for implementation.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates pairing the Hermes Agent with a Mixture of Agents approach for AI agent execution. The video shows how the two techniques operate together and points to resources for implementation. It matters as a concrete look at combining a single agent framework with multi-agent methods.
